text.message: im thinking i got cooked by black

? you get a stronger game with other spots

Ok relax, dont have to get mad

its the type of setup where blue just steamrolls
he can go cold if 6 stops rolling
yes sure the most likely number
ive been on it when its rolled like 1 time the whole game

i have brick if you need

ah yea its hard on phone

my bro i wasnt trading him
so you lied with a deal?
yes, player leading is extorting last place

road and maybe army if blue cant pop
